name: zar3a-fullstack
description: Zar3a Agricultural Platform - Full Stack Project

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd Zar3a && npm install && cd ../"zar3a-backend copy" && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo '✅ Setup complete! Run "npm run dev" to start both servers.'
